title: Product Brief — Stage 0 (Seed Input)
description: Initial product brief filled by the operator before any pipeline execution.

description.description: 1-3 sentence product description — what it is and does. Not marketing copy.

price.description: Price if known (e.g., '$49 one-time', '$29/mo'). Mark 'TBD' if unknown.

product_customizable.description: Can downstream pipelines recommend format/bundle/pricing changes? true for books/supplements/formulations, false for fixed physical products.
